title: Spell Enchants Expanded - Fix for the RPG Enchants
description: This Datapack makes more Armors be able to use Sunfire, Energize and soulfrost. This mostly works for magister, herald and some archer armors found in prominence II
body: This Datapack adds spell enchant compat to all archer armors from Archers Expansion, to all Magister and gleaming sets from Spellblades n such and herald armor from the same mod, as the tags do not work in the current version of Spell Engine
